notes: Extended-cycle companion to V3-EXQ-541b (4 cycles per run); this run uses sleep_loop_K=1 + EPISODES_PER_RUN=16 to give 16 cycles per run -- 4x the cumulative exposure. Five arms vary rem_precision_recalibration_step in {0.0_off, 0.05, 0.10, 0.25, 0.50} with precision_zero_point_ema_alpha=0.1 held constant. Same env, same seeds, same per-cycle telemetry as 541b. Tests whether F1 cross-arm divergence scales with cycle count (F1 sufficient given enough exposure -> Phase 7 stays deferred) or plateaus at 4-cycle level (F1 at its ceiling -> Phase 7 / Option B becomes load-bearing per REM-precision lit-pull SYNTHESIS dispatch case #3). NOT a supersession of 541b; together 541b+541c form the cycle-count dose-response for F1. Same C1-C4 acceptance criteria as 541b; primary scientific outcome is the 4-cycle vs 16-cycle divergence comparison.
